title: Louis & Luca - The Big Cheese Race
original_title: Solan og Ludvig: Herfra til Flåklypa
overview: Two rival villages, Flåklypa and Slidre, decide to re-launch their traditional Cheese Race after years of inactivity. The boastful bird Luca, the anxious hedgehog Louis and the kind-hearted inventor Reodor are sure they’ll come out on top in this adventurous showdown.
